plan: Contact the retailer's customer service (phone, chat, or email) and identify yourself as emma_smith_8564, located in New York, NY 10192.
Explain that you recently received a laptop and wish to initiate a return for a full refund.
Provide any order details you have — note that you believe the order was placed around April 2023 but are uncertain of the exact date.
State the reason for the return: you found a better deal elsewhere.
Ask the representative to look up your order using your account name and address if you cannot provide an exact order number or date.
Inquire about the return policy — specifically whether the item is still within the eligible return window given the approximate April 2023 purchase date.
If a full refund return is approved, ask for a prepaid return shipping label or drop-off instructions.
If the return window has passed and a return is not possible, ask whether the order can be canceled instead (relevant only if the item was very recently shipped and not yet fully processed).
If neither return nor cancellation is available, politely ask about any alternative options (store credit, exchange, etc.).
Confirm all next steps in writing (email confirmation of the return authorization, refund timeline, etc.) before ending the interaction.
